message.humancompanions.companion_bed_no: No companion bound to this bed.
message.humancompanions.companion_bed_se: Companion bed set. Now shift + right-click a companion to bind them.
message.humancompanions.companion_bound_: %s is now bound to this companion bed.
message.humancompanions.no_companion_awa: No companion awaiting respawn at this bed.
message.humancompanions.companion_bed_aw: Use a golden apple to revive them now, or wait until the next day.
message.humancompanions.companion_bed_br: Breaking this bed will permanently delete the companion awaiting respawn here!
message.humancompanions.companion_bed_re: Right-click with a stick to recall them to this bed.

item.humancompanions.companion_recall.hi: Shift + right-click a companion to assign. Right-click to recall them to you.
